headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $120
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Cooper Clark   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $113 to $120.

headline: Best Dividend Kings: March 2026
summary: The Dividend Kings outperformed SPY year-to-date, up 2.06% versus SPY's 3.06% loss, despite a March pullback. Check out the list here.
